description_long: This object consists of a rectangular flag attached to a tall, slender vertical pole. The flag itself is plain and unadorned, with a smooth, flat surface and no visible patterns, symbols, or text. The pole appears to be made of a dark, solid material, likely wood or metal, and is significantly longer than the width of the flag. The flag is mounted securely along one edge to the pole, with the rest of the fabric hanging freely. The overall construction is simple and utilitarian, suitable for marking locations or signaling in an urban environment. The flag's design and materials suggest it is intended for temporary or general-purpose use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A plain rectangular flag mounted on a tall, dark vertical pole, with a simple and unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular flag attached to the left side of a tall, dark pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the flag and pole, with the flag barely visible as a narrow strip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flag from the opposite side, with the pole now on the right and the flag's plain surface visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge of the flag and the length of the pole.
attribute_flag_design: A plain, solid white rectangular flag with no patterns, symbols, text, or emblems; the flag is featureless and unmarked.
